# might have UNKNOWN capabilities and/or incorrect data.

# It is assumed that reflectors without a version string are version 0.x.y
# You can edit any of these values if you know what they are.
#
# An empty 'IPv4-address' or 'IPv6-address' means it's not configured.
# An empty 'Modules' means it can't be determined and it won't be added.
#
# 'Special-modules' for M17 reflectors will pass encrypted voice data.
# 'Special-modules' for URF reflectors are fully transcoded.
#
